name: Solana & College.xyz x Blockchain Chicago
description:
Blockchain Chicago is proud to present Solana Across Campuses at UChicago, a nationwide meetup powered by College.xyz, bringing builders, creators, and curious minds together to explore the Solana ecosystem.

Come hang out, learn how to set up your first wallet, earn $500 worth of SOL, and see what students across the country are building on Solana.

name: Midwest Blockchain Conference
description:
Where Talent Meets Opportunity

The Midwest Blockchain Conference (MBC) is the leading access point connecting top university talent with the blockchain industry across the U.S. and beyond. What started in the heartland of Ann Arbor has grown into a national movement and global network, now spanning 70+ universities including schools in South America and Europe.

Built by students for students, MBC brings together university clubs, high schools, alumni, and industry leaders, all focused on pushing crypto forward through student leadership.
location: Ross School of Business, Ann Arbor, Michigan

name: Ravi Bakhai Guest Speaker Event
description: Join us to hear about Ravi Bakhai's journey from investment banking at Deutsche Bank to founding Hype (YC S22)! He'll also be sharing details about our memecoin trading competition, featuring a $2,000+ prize pool.

name: Jarry Xiao Tech Talk
description:
We're excited to host Jarry Xiao, cofounder of Ellipsis Labs, for a TED "Tech" Talk about on-chain market infrastructure, Solana spot markets, and real-time market microstructure.

If you're interested in DeFi, trading, market design, or have questions about how modern financial systems are being built from the ground up, you don't want to miss this.

name: Penn Blockchain Conference
description: The highest-signal conference of the year, hosted by University of Pennsylvania's student-led Blockchain Club. The 6th Penn Blockchain Conference bridges the gap between academia and industry in building decentralized systems, bringing together the brightest minds from around the world. Featured speakers include leaders from Fidelity, Dragonfly, Euler Finance, Coatue, Galaxy Ventures, Portal Ventures, Mastercard, Pantera, 21Shares, and more. The conference and hackathon are hosted in the grand and historic Penn Museum.

name: Miami Consensus
description: Consensus is CoinDesk's annual blockchain and Web3 conference, described as "the Super Bowl of Blockchain" and "the World Cup of Web3." The event brings together industry leaders, developers, investors, policymakers, and other professionals in the crypto and blockchain space. Consensus 2026 in Miami is expected to attract 20,000+ attendees from over 100 countries.
location: Miami Beach Convention Center, Miami, Florida
